data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a different return location in one-way rentals.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a different return location for one-way rentals. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or enforcement mechanisms that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a different return location, but without concrete API reads or persisted state checks, it is unclear if this requirement is being met.
gaps: No evidence of enforcement for different return location in one-way rentals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
